funny thing was they gave invoice before which they said that was mistake.  I've never had this experince before. All hotel in the world gave us invoice.

reviews.title: Very bad and not recommended
reviews.negatives:
I stayed in the imperial suit. The bathroom did not have shataf, SHOWER GEL, Not only that, no hot water in the shower.
The light in the kitchen wasn’t working,the lights sensors were acting crazy on and off, no tissue boxes except one in the room. 
The room wasn’t cleaned properly as well since we kept finding stuff and left overs from the previous guest. 
When we checked out and informed the stuff about our experience, she said ‘Sorry we hope it doesn’t happen again in your next visit ’ which meant that they don’t care at all in my opinion.
the valet is not managed properly.. they almost lost our car keys and it took us 30 mins to get.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Honestly, I wouldn’t recommend this hotel at all. There are many better options with better prices. Unfortunately, the quality keeps getting worse.

They gave us a worn-out room, and the bathroom had a really unpleasant smell that honestly seemed like there was a sewage issue. The room was booked for two people, yet they only provided one pair of slippers and one robe, and some basic amenities were missing as well.

On top of that, my friend left an envelope for me at the reception with my full name and room number, and they completely lost it. They never delivered it because apparently they “couldn’t find it.” Very disappointing experience overall.

reviews.title: it was like a punishment
reviews.negatives: when i cannot sleep due to bed bug

reviews.title: Rude Staff
reviews.text: Just avoid if you are a couple
reviews.room_type: Luxury King Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Disappointing!
reviews.negatives:
I booked two rooms for my family (my wife, my son, my friend, and myself), yet the hotel insisted that the booking only included breakfast for one person per room. They then charged us extra for additional breakfasts.

This policy makes absolutely no sense. It is unreasonable to assume that in a booking for multiple guests, only one person per room is entitled to breakfast. Does the hotel expect one person to eat while the other just watches?

As a frequent traveler, this is the first time I have ever experienced such a practice. What made the situation worse is that the hotel staff showed no initiative to resolve the issue or to care for guests — they simply insisted on the charges without considering fairness or common sense.

This left us with a very negative impression of the property. Travelers should be warned that this hotel prioritizes rigid policies over guest experience. Because of this, I would not recommend staying here, and I hope the management reviews this unreasonable practice.

reviews.title: Huge disappointment
reviews.text: Had to wait for 20 mins at the check-in counter. Went to the pool with the kids and to our surprise water was cold. Shower rooms were stinking and dirty. The TV in the room wasn't working. Room service was really bad. I'll definitely not book this hotel again and neither will recommend it for anyone.

reviews.title: Service is very bad!!
reviews.negatives:
Came here for post birthday celebration of my husband, requested for something special (thinking the hotel could do something to make it more memorable one) 

Talked to one of the agent thru the booking message, decors/towel setup should be 24hr notice and chargeable. (Which i get it and totally agreed, and no time for me to purchase it due to late notice) 

However, they have mentioned that they can arrange a complimentary cake, totally appreciated!!!


The next day, (day of checkin) call the hotel to confirm my booking and request/hotel offered. 

Everything is fine,

Til we reached the room, nothing was received/done

Called the Reception, and mentioned they will deliver it, still nothing came up .

Requested for amenities and towels before we check out (since we dont have any s we went to the beach and dropped our wet towels in concierge down) 

NOTHING WAS RECEIVED TOO til we checked out!!!

Sofitel by its name and since its 5star, we expected at least a good value but NAAAH.  Tho its an old hotel should have atleast a good service but NAAAAAAH

reviews.title: Flying in the room🤮

reviews.title: Doritos on the floor
reviews.text: When we got in the room, my toddler picked up a one piece of doritos chips and gave it to me.  I was so shocked where she took it under the bed. I had to call them to vaccuum again the floor as my toddler is running barefoot.  Also the kiddie pool wall has some black moulds. The breakfast is somehow disappointing.

reviews.title: Quality downgrade
reviews.text: I have been to Sofitel several times in the past; however, this time was the worse experience and most likely the last. First, I was booked into a room which was lower than what I had booked, upon talking to the receptionist to fix the issue, the acted “generous and kind to “upgrade” me to my ACTUAL booked suite. Additionally, I had requested for a non-smoking room, and they gave me a smoking room, when talking to the receptionist, they tried to deny that it was a smoking room, when there was an ashtray right in the living room. After receiving the booked suite, it was the wrong view (city not sea), but I had just gave up at that point. Finally, we tried calling for in room dining, no reply. Very disappointed, negative value for money.
reviews.room_type: Opera Suite, Club Millésime Access, 1 King Bed,  Sea and City View

They couldn't help with giving half a rate or any other solution as an early check in or late check out method. 

Disappointing!

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: needs improvement

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.negatives: My recent 4-night stay fell well below expectations for a hotel of this caliber, largely due to poor communication and ongoing disruptions that were never disclosed at booking. The main pool was unavailable for the duration of our stay, with no prior notice. Significant construction noise continued until 10:20 pm, forcing a room change on our second night. Two of the four restaurants were also under construction, and during dinner one evening we experienced extremely strong fumes that caused eye irritation and nausea, making it impossible to remain in the restaurant. Despite raising this as a potential health concern, it was dismissed as “paint fumes,” with no urgency or meaningful response. Requests to relocate to another hotel were refused. Basic amenities were also lacking — with no ice machines available, ice had to be ordered through room service with a wait time of up to 40 minutes. While I did eventually secure a complimentary late checkout after firm negotiation, it did little to offset the overall experience. Poor transparency and inadequate handling of guest concerns, especially during a holiday period, made this stay deeply disappointing.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Good

We are sorry to hear that your experience did not meet expectations, particularly regarding the showers, breakfast, lounge, and overall condition of the facilities. We understand your concerns and would like to assure you that plans for refurbishment are being reviewed to enhance guest comfort. Your comments have been shared with our team for immediate follow-up.

Kind regards,
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Extension time upto 1pm
reviews.text: They didn't allow me to checkout at 1pm, the reason is that they were overbooked. Still not everyone making a booking arrives at 12pm. Myself arrived at 4pm when I checked in..
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Daud,
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We apologize for the inconvenience caused regarding the checkout time. While we do strive to accommodate all guest requests, there are times when overbooking or other operational factors limit our ability to extend checkout times. We understand that not all guests arrive at the scheduled time, and we appreciate your understanding of our policy. We hope to have the opportunity to better serve you in the future.

Thank you for staying with us!

Best Regards
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I'm surprised this is considered a 5 stars
reviews.negatives: The water bottles in our room had a very potent smell of cigarettes. Clearly someone used them as an ashtray. I asked the staff and they told me these are taken to a workshop to be cleaned then filtered water is placed in them. Ours was absolutely nasty. The staff on the phone connected my call to someone who never answered. It was difficult to reach staff through the phone many times. I asked for an iron but they didn't bring it after 45 mins. Had to leave do i asked reception to leave it my room. When back, they did in fact leave an iron and board in my room, however, the iron was faulty and did not work. I'm a frequent travel and I stay 4-5 nights at minimum in hotels. This has been terrible.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: I have stayed in many Sofitels and I do find their insistence that the staff great everyone with a bonjour rather quirky and a touch risible. Rarely does one encounter anyone who can say another word in French! The hotel is centrally located and has a decent pool. The rooms are not 5* however and they are small in comparison to the competition. Nonetheless, the food is pretty decent as one would expect in a French establishment and the staff are very polite
reviews.positives: Location, breakfast and quirky french character occasionally

although requested a non-smoking room the only available was a smoking - I had to wait although I previously indicated my arrival time which is within hotel check-in policy

reviews.title: Not recommended. Expensive with zero experience!
reviews.positives: Check in experience. Location and view
reviews.negatives: This is my third time after years.. The hotel is cutting cost in everything and it's obvious. You could feel it in the lifeless flower at the entrance, switching off AC in the corridors. Very poor room service food (expensive and below worse). Bed is not comfortable.. Room is very dim and there a space of a removed stand lamp (it's obvious from the plug that is designed for stand lamps at hotels). The breakfast vibe looks like a school canteen. I paid for a suite experience.. Have access to club milesime.. It's a total flop! No food.. No service.. And ambience is beyond dull.. The lobby cafe supposed to be French style.. It's feels entering your elderly living room. But not cozy neither luxury.. I needed to call the concierge for 5 times to answer my call... This is not a sofitel experience at all. As if it's been given to some unexperienced group to run it..I don't recommend the hotel it's so dead.. Either they need to change the manger ans renovate. Or close the hotel.

reviews.title: Abudhabi is a nice place for relaxation
reviews.text: Very good. Staff are freindly , the hotel is clean and excellent lobby , difficult to locate on gps. Wifi available.

reviews.title: Way too expensive for what we got.
reviews.positives: Location was convenient. Allowed us a late checkout at 1 pm. Appreciated it since we checked in at 2 am.
reviews.negatives: Got to the room and found a stain on my pillow . It was replaced right away , but it shouldn’t have been there from the get go. The mattress was really old and made noises. The bathroom was dusty.  I think the hotel needs to be updated.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Well it's a good hotel to be fair however i wonder why its taking long time to check in. Hopefully not the case when we check out as we it's hard for us with a toddler. Apart from the pool nothing much to do actually.

reviews.title: Great Location for Business Travelers
reviews.text: Nice seasoned Sofitel on the scenic Abu Dhabi Corniche. Facilities are rather dated and could use some updating. Staff are fairly attentive, but don’t expect 5-star service. Housekeeping needs better attention to detail and cleanliness.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for sharing your feedback following your recent stay with us. We're glad to hear that you appreciated our prime location on the scenic Abu Dhabi Corniche — it's a favorite among many of our business travelers.

We also appreciate your honest comments regarding our facilities and service. While our property has a classic charm, we understand the importance of ongoing updates and are actively working on improvements. Your remarks about housekeeping and service attentiveness have been shared with the relevant teams to ensure we address these concerns promptly.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide an enhanced experience.

Warm regards,
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Good room, not the best views

Booked the room with the city view, only to be provided with a view of the adjacent building. Booking a sea view would have been better since it is unblocked.

Hotel room is great, but the lighting could have been better as one corner of the room does not have any light source.

Service is good, with complimentary valet parking.

The hotel is very nice and close to corniche , i like the room very much . However the staff at the front desk were so serious and very dry talking to me. 

I had asked them if its possible to get a little fruit and they said only for members , i told them at least banana but nothing happened . 

There is one guy his name roshen who helped me to take the lougage to my room who he made my stay great as he eas very talkative and such a very high costmer service he has.

reviews.title: Will not go again

The lamp fall off from the ceiling.
All the dust on the floor, the side of the bed.
I asked the staff to come to help but they couldn’t fix it, it was 23:30, having staff in the room while super tired..
They left taking the lamp, leaving all the dust everywhere and the screws on the floor. 
Very happy to sleep in a bed full of dust.

When talking about this to the reception the only answer was « sorry ». For almost a thousand aed the night, I would have appreciate more than a simple sorry .

I will definitely not book again in this hotel.

We enjoyed the stay

reviews.response:
Dear Chun,

Thank you for your kind words regarding your recent stay with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your time at Sofitel Abu Dhabi Corniche and found our shuttle bus service helpful. It is our pleasure to provide a comfortable experience for our guests.

Kirlos Abdou
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Shockingly disappointing
reviews.negatives: Furniture is old and depressing. The bed in the first room i got was stinky and i found hairs in the bathroom and some dust all over the room. Overall cleanliness is very disappointing. AC in the bedroom was not working the first day. There’s a smoking detector right above the bed with constantly flashing lights that might drive you insane at night while trying to sleep. Tried the in-room dining once (Arabic grill) and absolutely hated it (food was cold and bland). I don’t how this hotel is allowed to be 5-Star, or carry the name Sofitel, or charge these rates! Just run away there are many better options. Don’t be fooled by the ratings and the pictures.

reviews.title: Decent but overpriced
reviews.text: The establishment pretty much covers the basics of what would qualify as a 5 star hotel. But I’ve had better value for money basically at every other 5 star hotel I’ve stayed at. The facility is old, outdated design, no focus on cleanliness. The location is what makes up for it.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Haider,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are pleased to hear that our location was a highlight of your stay. However, we are truly sorry to learn that the overall value, condition of the facilities, and cleanliness did not meet your expectations. Your comments are very important to us, and we will be addressing these points with our team to ensure improvements are made. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more satisfying experience in the future.

 Best Regards,
Guest Experience Team
reviews.room_type: Luxury King Room with Sea View

Just the same, when I was claiming our luggages kept at the concierge, she asked me to come with her in the room where all our luggages were kept and take them all by myself. Unbelievably insane.

reviews.title: Pleasant short break
reviews.text:
Friendly staff
Good location

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: bad smell

reviews.title: Very disappointed
reviews.negatives: Rooms are old, dirty stained carpets and furniture, my room didn't have a fridge and I had to call several times for them to get me a fridge! Curtain doesn't have black out, so I could see all the street lights which made it hard for me to sleep.

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text: A modern, new hotel in Abu Dhabi.  The hotel is one tower of a four tower building the rest seemed to be apartments.  The pool is on the top of the common podium bit on teh eighth floor so good views of the sea.  The hotel seemed modern and business like and not many children whichwas  great bonus for us.  THe only poor design was that the bathroom was in the bedroom and only separated by a sliding door, however the rain shower was excellent.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
There was no safety box in the room.
the Bathroom was with no water 'Shataf'
changing the room was a disaster process, although the room was next door and its ready and clean, still could not move in until clearance from housekeeping which took long time that i have to go out and come back later at night.
staff are fine although they lack delegacies,

reviews.title: decenty hotel in an excellent location
reviews.text: I had stayed in the Sofitel property in Bahrain where the service let me down in a big way but I do like the brand and I wanted to try this brand new property in Abu Dhabi. The reception was very warm. The pool is quite large and has decent loungers although the service at the pool could be better . The staff psent most of their time chatting with each oter in an aniumated fashion at the bar and little time serving the guests. they also boasted pormotions that they seemed to have no idea of at the bar itself. The see food restaurant is lacking in atmiosphere despite calling itself the best seafood restaurnat in town. You could die of boredoem here. The food was also not up to scratch in my view. Over all I was not overly happy with hotel as the rooms are very small but it did offer value for money. there was very little French about it sadly although all the staff adddress you with the customnary Bonjour, that is about it.

reviews.title: It was ok would i come again only if the price is low
reviews.positives: The only thing that i can say i liked was the housekeeping that was very good and listened to my requests around the room set up.
reviews.negatives: I was there as a long stay guest but the hotel didn’t do anything for me. The steam was not working the whole time and i couldnt add the point.

reviews.title: Comfortable business hotel
reviews.positives: New hotel in Abu Dhabi business district

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.negatives:
I didn't like that I came back to my imperial suite 
And it's wasn't cleaned yet the food was still on the table bedroom wasn't settled and bathroom also
I left the suite at 12 pm. I came 7.30 pm
And when I called, an Indian lady answered my call
The first thing she said, maybe you 
Forgot the do not disturb light that is ofcourse not true because if I did I wouldn't ask why u didn't clean my suite I would ask nicely to send someone to clean it. And the fix my room light was on bu the way. That's why I had to leave the hotel at the same time and checked out because I was supposed to rest one hour and leave again to a meeting and my check out was supposed to be the second day

reviews.title: Comfy bed and nice shower
reviews.text: I enjoyed everything about this hotel and I'll definitely try it again.
reviews.positives: The bed was super soft and comfy, staff was nice, and the location is super close to beach

reviews.title: First and last residence.
reviews.positives:
- Staff very kindly and collaboratively.
- The view was not bad.
reviews.negatives:
- There is no bathroom bidet. 
- The bed is not comfortable. 
- There is a shortage of room supplies (slippers, towels, bathrobes, tissues, cans of drinking water). 
- Cups and glasses are not clean. 
- The buffet does not contain worthy dishes.

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text:
It was great and the staff was friendly 
Special thanks to staff Emad in reception
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Oraib,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback. We’re delighted to hear that you had a great stay and that our team made you feel welcome. Your kind words about Emad are truly appreciated, and we will be sure to share your compliments with him. We look forward to welcoming you back again soon.

 Best Regards,
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
The place and location was good 
But the toilet they don’t have shtaaaf for toilet only for a few rooms

reviews.title: Pool Amenities
reviews.text: We booked in Sofitel because of the nice swimming pool, it was big and clean. However there was no heater at the adult and kids pool. My kids did not enjoy at all because of the cool wind and water as well. But overall, its commedable.

reviews.title: Not up to Sofitel standards
reviews.negatives:
The hotel is nowhere near 5-star standard. We planned to celebrate our wedding anniversary (which we mentioned in our request), but our request was ignored. The room was prepared for one person. The reception staff were tired and unfriendly, and didn't even provide basic information about the hotel. Water dripped from the taps, the lampshade was broken, the windows were so dirty that it was impossible to enjoy the view, and the shower head was wrapped in  tape... The breakfast was really average. The price did not match the quality of service at all! Absolutely disappointed ! 
This is not the standard of Sofitel.

reviews.title: Accomodating Stafffs
reviews.text: Islam- the guy in the reception upgraded our hotel room. He is nice and accomodating. Room is clean.

reviews.title: Our stay at the Sofitel Abu Dhabi Corniche was pleasant overall and not too bad, and the room view was amazing. However,
reviews.negatives: Honestly the cleaning and the furniture condition was so bad not expected for Sofitel level

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Big room
Nice service

Toilet didn’t always flush completely 
Bath didn’t work properly but we were not concerned. 

Found cheaper restaurants in crown plaza

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Valet staff were very slow

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Not what I expected from a 5 stars hotel. Disappointed
reviews.positives: The receptionist was very welcoming and nice. Room size with the sea view is amazing.  Breakfast was great.
reviews.negatives: Valet wasn’t helpful at all. I parked and waited then went to them they still speaking & laughing with each other. I asked if they will take the car or no? Then with bad attitude responded to me also there was another car waiting and horn. The Trolley/ room service team took 2 hr and half to bring my luggage. I called many times. if I didn’t went down my stuff will remain in the lobby while telling me for 2hrs that my luggage own!?

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
We have stayed in a number of hotels in Abu Dhabi and whilst the Sofitel is lacking somewhat with a pool / beach area with a sunny aspect, the attitude and professionalism of all the staff more than compensate for this.
The Millesime Lounge on the 35th floor was a gem and besides the canapés and drinks late afternoon, provided a bite to eat throughout the day if needed.
Special thanks to Marifhel who managed the Club Lounge including guest arrivals. She was both courteous and welcoming from arrival through to departure and a real asset to the Sofitel Brand.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
One of your staff her attitude is not good 
She told me I’m the only one working order everything before she was so angry to me in the morning

reviews.title: Never doubt Sofitel
reviews.text: My first choice in Abu Dhabi.

reviews.title: not bad
reviews.negatives: the lady in the reception not trying to help or advise me she also not friendly, no lotion for the body in the room and just two bottles of water, no one help me with my bags, value parking not good

reviews.title: Nice!!
reviews.text: Pros, customer service is amazing and very professional staff. Location is not bad, but the hotel has so much value especially in there suites!!!! Con is location

reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.negatives: We stayed with family in the superior room just one night and i would never stay again. The room was tired, bathroom could use deep cleaning, the water dispenser was broken. The quality of the bed was particularly poor - truly the most uncomfortable and hard bed i have ever experienced. Overall, the room doesnt comply with the claimed standard.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Room was good but there was a constant bad smell in the toilet. Food options wasnt that nice . Swimming pool was best

old hotel need to renvite 
price very high

reviews.title: Marvelous
reviews.text: Very helpful staff, on duty manager checked me in while he saw me waiting in a queue and assisted me with late check out, the gentleman who took my luggage to my room was back in literally two minutes to bring my cell phone that i had forgotten at the reception (before i even realized it was missing) . THANK YOU VERY MUCH. Apologies for not taking your name down. Overall great hotel, Buffet menu could have been more diverse and catering to multicultural ethnic group that attended the seminar with me. Personally i could not complain.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Bucketclist check!
reviews.text: Its was wonderful .. although if i amy complain one thing, it was the ac in the hallway, really warm .. no ac at all, the room also was not very cold.
reviews.positives: - the view , especiallt the pool area, soft pillows and bed and 3rd the spa

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Room was smelling of smoke and mold. Didn't enjoy it.

reviews.title: Worth money
reviews.text: Pleasant

reviews.title: A bit worn down
reviews.positives: The hotel stay was ok for my quick stay. The staff was nice.
reviews.negatives: I was disappointed in the bedding as there was a big hole. Also I found hair and string in the shower and the walls were scratched in the room. I know it’s an older hotel but I think upkeep is important. I don’t want to feel like someone was in the room before me.

reviews.title: Great stay and comfy bed
reviews.text: Enjoyed this stay with a comfy bed, nice staff Roshen, and receptionist.

reviews.title: Disappointing stay !!!
reviews.positives: The location is perfect, accessible to many different services at Abu Dhabi city
reviews.negatives:
I stayed 2 nights, my room was not cleaned.
The WC was broken and after reporting they fix it 
The AC was not cooling at all, even after reporting no action taken

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: This hotel have very good and comfortable rooms. We eat a few times in the french restaurant and eat the best tomato soup ever. You should go there. The waiter is very friendly and high service. High service you get also from the roomservice. Poor is the service on the frontdesk. We checked out and the want to charge our creditcard again. We already paid by Agoda but they where not that nice in the morning we left the hotel. We nearly missed our flight because of this trouble we had with the frontdesk manager. After we show on our creditaccount and the voucher from Agoda we did pay the room he told us ok you can go. But when we came home we found out he did took money for the room without our permission. After a few mails with the main office from Sofitel we did get out money back. So the hotel is very very nice but we did have this very bad experience with the manager.
reviews.positives: Very nice and comfortable room, very good french restaurant, location

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.negatives: The toilets are not like the UAE normal style which is inconvenient for us as arabs

reviews.title: Great Hotel, exceptional value for money
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, quiet, close to beach, well connected and the staff ready to help you to have a pleasant stay. I can have a very good promotional prices and the room will be extremely convenient.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: THE HOTEL IS NICE , LOCATION IS NOT BAD BUT NOT GREAT, BREAKFAST IS GOOD.
reviews.negatives: THE BED WAS BAD. WANTED TO RESERVE A TABLE IN A RESTAURANT NEAR BY, THE HELP DESK HAD NO IDEA AND GAVE ME WRONG INFORMATION. I HAD TO SEARCH FOR THE NUMBER AND CALL MY SELF. VALET PARKING KEEP MOVING MY CAR FROM ONE PARKING TO ANOTHER WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE I SAW THEM FROM MY WINDOW WHEN I ASKED THEM WHY THEY SAID THEY HAVE AN EVENT SO THEY MOVED IT?!!!.

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel
reviews.text:
It was a satisfying stay for us because not only the location of the hotel is strategic, we got the sea view which was excellent.
Wouldn't mind staying there again if I ever have the opportunity in the future.

reviews.title: Not happy about my stay
reviews.negatives:
The bed wasn’t comfortable, the toilet didn’t have a “shataf “ water hose (this is a basic here) , cleaning personnel had bad personal hygiene , the flush of the bathroom wasn’t working properly.
Windows are very dirty

Room cleaning is below average

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I have tried to surprise my fiancee with a bouquet flowers and a postcard. They assured me, that will be there on arrival, but nothing in my room, even after my payment for the flowers. A cake was waiting for her in the room with letters - Happy Birthday. My fiancee birthday was on totally different day. Such a mess. I have booked a room with a sofa, but only an armchair. Its was very frustrating. I wrote an email to the guest relations and they changed the room next day, but the surprise was not there anymore.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Atanas,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the confusion and the disappointing experience you encountered during your stay. We understand how important it is to make special occasions memorable, and we deeply regret that we fell short in delivering the surprise you had planned for your fiancée.

We apologize for the mix-up with the flowers and the cake, and for the confusion regarding your fiancée’s birthday message. This was certainly not the experience we strive to provide our guests, and we have taken note of your concerns to ensure this does not happen in the future.

In regards to your room, we regret that the sofa you had requested was not available and that we could not meet your expectations immediately. We're glad that we were able to change the room for you, but we understand that the timing of this did not allow you to fully enjoy your planned surprise.

We truly appreciate your understanding and patience in this matter, and we would lov

reviews.negatives: The room was old and outdated, in terrible need of being refurbished, scratches on the cheap furniture inside, desk filthy, stained carpet.  The cost does not reflect a what is being offered.  This isn't 5 star for sure.

reviews.text: I was with my family and relatives, we enjoyed our stay..  The only issue we had was the room was a bit dusty. Hopefully they will address that issue, other than that the whole stay was fun and memorable.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
1- No chairs in the lobby, you can find it far away only
2- I checked in at 5:30pm which is after the regular check in time but i got a room which is not ready.
3- No refrigerator in my room i asked about it and it seems that the engineering for got to fix it back.
4- There was no bath towels in the room.
5- Its disappointing that the hotel is having small swimming pool for the size of The hotel.
6- if you give your car to the valet parking it will be parked out side in the sun no cover.
7- the price i paid for my room was to high for this room i can get even bigger rooms in 5 star hotels by the beach.

reviews.title: For those who want to experience downtown Abu Dhabi

The coffee set up had no stirrers or teaspoons. The location for the capsule on the coffee machine was very dirty on the inside.

reviews.text:
Staff are friendly 
Good location

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: I had confirmed that the hotel would make special arrangements upon arrival as a surprise for my fiancee to celebrate our recent engagement. They did not do this. I booked a seaview room and the room we were given was looking at a concrete wall. When I went to the desk to raise these issues the staff were very rude and unprofessional. No sun on the pool at all.

reviews.title: Good gym facilities, excellent breakfast
reviews.text: Decent hotel with good facilities and friendly staff.

reviews.title: The value was great compared to the price i paid. But the service need to be improved
reviews.positives: I got a good deal from booking app so, it was worth it.
reviews.negatives: The staff took for ever to reply, in addition when a request was given it took a minimum of 30min to be done. At first we asked for room service since something was spilled they took almost an hour. When checking out the staff took almost 40min to come pickup the luggage.

reviews.title: the A/C was so Hot and the bathroom had an awful smells.
reviews.text:
The A/C was so Hot and the bathroom had an awful smells!! 
I do report that to the staff and they change my room .. but still i faced the same problems in the another room!

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: Location of the hotel is good and staff was kind.
reviews.negatives:
When we got to the room the sink wasn't clean and there was hair everywhere. And the towels were missing as well, which I guess happens to the best of hotels. But when you're paying a premium, it shouldn't happen. 

There were cockroaches in the room, and it was pretty traumatising for my wife and me. We woke up in the morning and couldn't count the number of cockroaches in the kettle and cupboards. Felt absolutely gross. 

When we checked out, we told the manager, and he offered us lunch on the house and offered to upgrade our room in our next stay. But none of those gestures can make up for having cockraoches in a 5 star hotel like Sofitel. We just wanted to leave after that. 

At this point, only a refund would be acceptable. But we didn't ask or push for it.

reviews.title: A centrally located hotel
reviews.text: Excellent executive lounge service with lovely staff. The only downside the room was noisy overlooking the side facing the Sheraton and hospital , I think from the room top generators of other buildings? The windows were very dirty too

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: very comfortable, and it makes me relax at the same time .
reviews.negatives: there is no any entertainment inside the room like in the television . but overall it was a good staycation .

will definitely come back.

Just one thing I feel can be improved is the quality of food , for both the stays I have ordered room service ( specially during the night) and being to the poolside resturant and the quality of food served definately have room for improvement. However the breakfast buffet options are good.

reviews.negatives: Quiet old & outdated property. Cleaning should be brought to the attention. Breakfast & dinner buffet are below average with very law quality of food. Bedsheets as well as glasses during buffet have smell.

reviews.negatives: There room was smiley and it was un comfortable

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel
reviews.text:
I stayed here during the height of the covid nonsense so felt the staff were pretty 'over the top' with enforcing all the rules.  I got told to wear a mask while sitting and eating breakfast, when I asked how I could eat with a mask on I was told to pull it down to eat then put it back up.  Plus I was told I had to wear one when I re-entered the building after going for a run.  Ridiculous.  

However, the hotel is spectacular.

reviews.negatives: It’s a bit old building, not really clean bathroom, room service was average, in fact we never received water we requested

reviews.title: Brilliant Weekend Getaway
reviews.text: Stayed here for the weekend and it was fantastic value for money. Got an incredible deal through Agoda and on top of that, we were upgraded to a suite - thank you Agiles at the reception! Would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Elevator takes so long, reception response slow in check in

reviews.text: We love staying in here even though there are very limited amenities. The view at the pool at night was amazing. The room is spacious,clean and the staffs are very attentive and generous to provide your needs like water, tea, toiletries, etc. Highly recommended and we'll keep coming back.

reviews.text: Fantastic!

reviews.title: Had more expectations about Sofitel chain
reviews.negatives: I think hotel needs to be renovated

reviews.title: Vacation
reviews.text: Hotel was nice and quiet and safe for me as a solo traveler

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Got a spacious room with a nice sea view as we requested.
Breakfast was good.
reviews.negatives: Pool was clean but the water was freezing cold, was not set to room temperature.

reviews.title: All class
reviews.text: Amazingly, they greeted me by name when the car pulled up. I felt important to them before I even got into the front door. Great reception after a long flight.
reviews.positives: Great room, great service, good food.

reviews.title: It was good staying overall, and thank you for having me
reviews.positives: The property is clean, good location and friendly staff
reviews.negatives: The pool is overshadowed by the building itself in the morning time, the parking service staff are chaotic, sometimes they loses the keys sometimes they take too long to bring the car.

reviews.title: "life is magnifique"
reviews.text:
Indeed "life is magnifique" :)
The room and the contemporary design really is unique and blow you away. The state of the art furnishing, massive bathroom, sound proofing, and the overall ambiance take you away. Top it with the cordial hospitality of the staff makes you feel good and special.

During my stay for about 3 nights, I found the staff very cordial and helpful. They even took the liberty to arrange a complementary baby cot even without me asking for it! The view from the room is also breath taking as this is a tall building. The dinning is a touch expensive but at the same time, they make sure to provide you with a memorable experience.

On the flip side, the Lobby is not impressive. I mean there is no place to sit expect for the cafe. For a hotel of this magnitude, it would have been better to have a larger and grand lobby. Perhaps they wanted to give it a unique touch.

All in all, it worth it!
reviews.positives: The decor, The Staff performance, The sheer size

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Service. Everytime I needed something I would keep calling for more than 15 minutes just for someone to answer me. Room dining and concierge super slow in responding. But housekeeping reply to phone really fast.

reviews.title: Loved every moment of our stay at the Sofitel
reviews.text: Thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the Sofitel Abu Dhabi Corniche - the staff were extremely attentive and helpful, easy access to airport limo, taxis readily available at all times, pool area relaxing and enjoyable, but it was very windy up there.  Foyer very easy on the eye, great candle ritual when the sun goes down - would do it again any time
reviews.positives: Lovely room, great bathroom with beautiful lotions and potions, fabulous staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room. It is big and comfy with a good sea view. Thank you for the cute birthday cake for my wife.
reviews.negatives: My kids don't like the food in breakfast buffet, less option for picky kids. No facility area for kids to play. No fridge inside luxury room with sea view.

reviews.title: New, Classy, Great Breakfast
reviews.text: Stayed for the Abu Dhabi triathlon.  We were updated to the suite with Ocean View which was fantastic.  The B'fast, although on the pricey side, was fantastic.  Friendly and very helpful staff - a big shout out to John the concierge who really helped out with tourist spot and restaurant recommendations and transportation (my bike bag wouldn't fit in a normally taxi so he called one of his buddies to help that came within 20 mins!)
reviews.positives: Friendly and Helpful Staff, Classy, Great Breakfast

reviews.title: Good stay for a quick visit to Abu Dhabi
reviews.negatives:
Tv channels were not indicated correctly
The lady who answers for the dine in service is not friendly and has an attitude which is not great when dealing with guests

reviews.title: We are satisfied
reviews.text: We are satisfied with hotel services and good design room.
reviews.positives: Luxury hotel, nice sea view from the top and modern design

reviews.title: come for the hotel but stay for breakfast
reviews.positives: the view, the breakfast and the location
reviews.negatives: outdated hotel that needs renovation , guys at the reception look rude and sad, lazy housekeeping forgot to put a soap in my toilet for 5 days and one day they decided not to clean the room. breakfast and its staff are amazing one of the best.

reviews.title: Great hotel, new and modern.
reviews.text: The hotel is delightful and one of my favourite places in Abu Dhabi. I plan to use this as my future base when in the city.

reviews.title: A memorable stay which could have been easily better had the service level been at least to the expected level.
reviews.positives: Location and the size of the property
reviews.negatives: The drainage in bath area of washroom was defective. The room and washroom didn’t feel fresh and squeaky clean when we checked in. The room did not have room slippers & tissue box. The washroom had body wash but no loofah. The room service indeed too slow. Had to give repeated reminders to get the above sorted out.

reviews.title: Weekend Stay at Sofitel
reviews.text:
Great views of the Corniche with good facilities. 
Warm and welcoming staff. The hotel lives up to its expectations for providing sound sleep.
Looking forward to visiting again
reviews.room_type: Luxury King Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Short stay for work.
reviews.positives: Nice room, quite big, with the bathroom open (or not) in the room.
reviews.negatives:
There was only warm water for the bath, and the shower was leaking.
The valet parking staff doesn’t understand English well. And the restaurant at the pool level, the staff sees you waiting but don’t come to ask you what you want. Some people left, I went to the bar to ask if they were still serving food…

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Highly recommended this Sofitel
reviews.response:
Dear Mrs. Maryam,
Thank you so much for your kind review! We're thrilled to hear that you had a great experience at Sofitel. We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back soon for another wonderful stay!

Best Regards
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Nice hotel however pool needs refurbishment. Good location  and spacious rooms. 7/10 however could do with a more mo
reviews.negatives: Outdate  pool

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Fabulous and clean

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Nothing, unless the TV it wasn't smart

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Their spa is very clean professional had one of the amazing message after a long drive ask for Liza , the hotel is very relaxing and location is worth the money

reviews.title: Feels more like a 4 stars hotel
reviews.positives: The location and breakfast were really good!
reviews.negatives: We chose the hotel to spend the night after a long flight. We requested an extra bed to be added for my 6 years old son through the reservation and through a separate message sent to the Hotel, as a reply to their welcome message and enquire if there were any special requests from our side. We arrived and the bed was not in the room. We called twice the hotel office until the bed arrived and the staff member wanted to leave it in the middle of the room. We had then to request for him to move the table and chair, so the bed could be placed by the side of our bed. A hassle which could have been easily avoided.

reviews.title: Remarkable experience!
reviews.text:
I have always wanted to experience staying at Sofitel ever since I lived here in Abu Dhabi. Before the Pandemic, whenever I need to have a break, I would check-in at Hotels and enjoy the amenities, breakfast and have a stress-free day. The receptionist automatically upgraded my room to a Prestige Suite asa their "Guest of the Day" without me asking which is really kind and something valuable to me. We got an Amazing Sea view and our requests have been given with no charge! We really enjoyed our breakfast since there's not much guests during Ramadan season, and the outdoor pool and jacuzzi is all to ourselves.

The only downside in our experience is the lady concierge, whom I felt, she judged us poorly at Dinner in Grills@Chill'O. She's really impolite and had to use inappropriate words to express that the blame was on us since we came a little but late for the Dinner buffet. I did not allow her attitude to ruin our experience and so I still consider our stay quite memorable!

All in all, I am really grateful to the receptionist, please find her (booking time April 21 - 3pm) who made my first Sofitel experience truly astounding and to Agoda for letting me find this amazing deal!
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Marielle, 

We are glad to hear that you had a remarkable experience despite of some unpleasant experience with our team member and please allow us to express our sincerest apologies. Your comment does not reflect the standard of service for which we take great care. Rest assured that this issue will be addressed to our respective Head of Department. 

Thank you very much for bringing this matter to our attention so we are able to continuously work on improving our level of service.

We hope to welcome you back again in the near future. 

Best regards, 
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Fair
reviews.negatives: Pool temperature was not controlled, no proper rules in the pool. Ball games with group of families we’re without considering other swimmers.

reviews.title: Stunning
reviews.text: Room was amazing ,  in the city center so a bit far from yas island . The staff  made this one last night amazing with kind gestures. Will come again if i pass throug Abu dhabi
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Nadia, 

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are pleased to know that you liked our room. 

We hope to welcome you back again soon when you get the chance to come back to Abu Dhabi. 

Best regards, 
Guest Experience Team

reviews.negatives:
Carpet bit stinky
Malfunctioned Toilet flush (noticed in the morning)

reviews.title: Marvelous👌🏻
reviews.text: We had a great time! The room was very clean and with incredible panoramic view over the whole town. Both Grills&ChillO as well as Jazz&Fizz were good and with great atmosphere inside. Staff is very welcoming and friendly. Bartender Zedrick fixed us perfect drinks through the couple of hours👍🏻
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Maria, 

It is always a great motivation and recognition for our teams to hear about guest satisfaction which is our main goal.We will definitely extend your appreciation with the team in particular to Zedrick. 

Thank you and we look forward to your next visit. 

Best regards, 
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: Generally well located and friendly staff and good service. The hotel needs an update and the cost is somewhat high in i
reviews.positives:
The staff were friendly 
Breakfast and in room dining were very good
reviews.negatives: The room needs an update. The water in the shower took very long to warm up alittle but there was no hot water.

reviews.title: It a wonderful 5star hotel with reasonable prices,
reviews.text:
Tidy rooms 
Lots of amenities 
Luxurious furnished 
Luxurious Bathroom 
Bed and linen was AAA class.

reviews.title: Nice view and friendly staff but average food
reviews.positives: The staff was nice and helpful, we were upgraded and had a nice view
reviews.negatives: The food for both breakfast and dinner was inferior to what we had at other Accor hotels in the world such as Pullman hotels when Sofitel is supposed to be more luxurious.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel with nice room and very clean
reviews.text: Fantastic!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Dark furnishings, looks dated. Dirty windows mars what would be an excellent view

reviews.title: One of the Best Hotels in Abu Dhabi !!!!
reviews.text: I had a very nice and enjoyable stay at Sofitel. I liked the room and how clean it is and the service level of the hotel. I would definitely stay at Sofitel on my the next visit to Abu Dhabi.
reviews.positives: 1) Room Cleanliness    2) Excellent Service   3) Staff Quality & Friendliness

reviews.title: Overall good experience, however it’s not value for money!
reviews.positives:
Excellent Location 
Wonderful Breakfast 
Parking Access & Valet
reviews.negatives:
flexibility and willing to help were missing at the receptionist side. 
Bathroom is a miss without embedded water access

reviews.title: a great value for money.
reviews.text: The bed was comfortable,  the staff were really helpful in every way possible

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The staff at the reception was very dismissive

reviews.title: Sofitel Abu Dhabi Corniche
reviews.text: All O.K. , except the Food was very expensive , Breakfast for one person about US$ 40 , why ?

reviews.title: Nice staff and good service.
reviews.negatives: Price

reviews.title: WONDERFUL
reviews.text: UNFORGETTABLE

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the weather was cold for the pool. So we did not use any of the three pools. Food was good, bathtub is something that we liked.
reviews.negatives: I did not like the TV, it is a good TV, but hotel installed there their own app, so it was not easy to watch something. Internet speed is low

reviews.title: Anazing
reviews.text: Fantastic, an absolute pleasure and can't wait to return xxx
reviews.positives: Staff, quality and attentiveness, attention to detail

reviews.title: Overall it was pretty good
reviews.positives: The location was ideal, the room design was stylish, and the view was truly impressive. The hotel staff was very friendly and welcoming, fulfilling all requests quickly.
reviews.negatives: Considering the price, a proper coffee machine in the room would have been appreciated rather than 3-in-1 coffee. We also noticed that the spa services were not fully operating.

reviews.title: luxury hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is quite new and the location is very good. everything was well appointed and the room was clean and comfortable. I liked the staff attention to details and they were very helpful and go the extra step to make sure your are very satisfied. The room was high tech with big TV and and nice bathroom and the size was also good.

reviews.title: Okay for the night.
reviews.positives: Location and friendliness of the staff, breakfast was amazing. Quick responsiveness of the staff to change our room, as the AC in our room did not work at night.
reviews.negatives:
Dust was on remote, TV and radio.
Spoon was used from previous visitor and not cleaned.
Small dust and hair in the cups near the coffee machine.

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text:
الفندق نظيف 
الاستاف متعاون 
المرافق واسعة و جميلة حوض السباحة و الجيم 
البوفيه متنوع

reviews.title: Nice and wonderful place
reviews.positives: Clean, friendly stuff great location wonderful breakfast
reviews.negatives: I did not be told or guided by the staff about breakfast time and idea about facilities in the hotel at the beginning of check-in, which is ready considered as negative thing

reviews.title: Many Thanks
reviews.text: Many thanks for the services, cleanliness, food
reviews.response:
Dear Mohamed,

Thank you for your kind words regarding our services, cleanliness, and food. We are delighted to hear that you had a positive experience at Sofitel Abu Dhabi Corniche. Your feedback is greatly appreciated and motivates our team to continue delivering exceptional hospitality.

Best Regards
Nessrine Ouhibi
Guest Relation Team.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
No hygienic showers,
Fitness is very dirty, especially washrooms

reviews.title: A remarkable Stay
reviews.text:
The cleanliness of the hotel was impeccable; every corner of the room was spotless, making it a comfortable retreat. 

The room design was not only aesthetic but also functional, with everything thoughtfully arranged. It felt spacious and welcoming, which made my stay very enjoyable.

reviews.title: It was excellent and the staff are accommodating
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Sofitel Corniche
reviews.text: L’hôtel regorge de restaurants internes et d’espaces de détente. La piscine est incroyable, les chambres sont super propres et spacieuses 🥰 je recommande fortement

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.negatives: Location in bussy area. Pillows options are limited. Pillows was not comfy for us.Asked for mid firm pillow but had a hard one . Breakfast is Ok.

reviews.title: Satisfied Client
reviews.text:
I just wnat to thank for all the staff of Sofitel Hotel Abudhabi, they are very Kind and helpfull especially to Allen the Kabayan lady in the reception. 

Over all are so satisfying me and my husband enjoy our stay, very clean the ambiance is so good try also there buffet. 

Thankyou so Much Sofitel Abudhabi. 

🙏
reviews.response:
Dear  Mrs. Jodie,
Thank you so much for your kind and heartfelt feedback!

We’re truly delighted to know that you and your husband enjoyed your stay with us at Sofitel Abu Dhabi. It’s wonderful to hear that our team, especially Allen at the reception, made such a positive impression—your kind words will surely mean a lot to her and the entire team.

We’re also pleased that you appreciated the cleanliness, ambiance, and our buffet offerings. Your satisfaction is our greatest reward, and we can’t wait to welcome you back for another memorable experience.

With warm regards
Guest Experience Team
